title: Better Breaking
description: Adds better block breaking animation to minecraft!!!
body:
# Better Breaking

### Ever felt that Minecraft’s default block breaking animation is too choppy?

Better Breaking gives your world a fresh visual polish by replacing the classic destroy stages with high-quality, smoother transitions.


## ✨ Features:
Gradual, seamless breaking animation for all blocks
Subtle visual glow for progress feedback (optional)
Fully compatible with shaders and texture packs
Lightweightm no performance impact
## 🎨 Perfect for:
Builders, cinematics, or anyone who wants a more immersive Minecraft experience.

## 💡 Works on: Minecraft 1.9+
